blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,795 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
